blended.narrative: Loveland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
